selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining immediate repair follow-on on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the autowiggle repair and A1 overlay firewall family into controller-facing proof, schema, and helper-memory fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next compact grammar and admissibility packet once the work-surface pair is cleared.
Strongest next archive-boundary lineage packet after the current repair and firewall control pair.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the repair, firewall, schema-lock, and helper-memory packet tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: SPILLOVER_PATCH_IS_NOT_ACTIVE_RUNTIME_PROOF
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent proof-boundary tension into a controller gate against reading spillover repair notes as active runtime proof.

candidate_items.name: GAP_TO_PATCH_TO_VALIDATION_REPAIR_FLOW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent repair-lineage sequence from gap identification through validation gates.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_FUEL_CANNOT_SELF_ADMIT_TO_KERNEL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent overlay firewall packet into a controller rule against self-authorized kernel admission.

candidate_items.name: SCHEMA_LOCK_EXACTNESS_GATE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the hardened firewall layer into a compact exactness gate for proposal-side intake artifacts.

candidate_items.name: VERSIONED_NONCANON_HELPER_MEMORY_BOUNDARY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves useful helper-memory persistence while keeping noncanon status explicit and subordinate.

quarantined_items.name: DRAFT_PATCH_AND_HARDENED_PATCH_COLLAPSE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves field and token drift between the draft repair surface and the hardened patch summary.

quarantined_items.name: PERSISTENT_A1_BRAIN_AS_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Helper-memory utility remains paired with authority risk and must not be promoted into active authority.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier six controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the seventh bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
